[doctor] 运行摘要
- run_id: fixture-post-rollback-inspection
- checkpoint: completed
- resumed_from: fixture-legacy-fallback
- lineage.mode: resume
- lineage.is_resumed_run: True
- lineage.source_run_id: fixture-legacy-fallback
- lineage.source_checkpoint: completed
- lineage.source_resumed_from: 无
- lineage.resume_strategy: post-rollback-inspection
- lineage.resume_strategy_reason: source rollback already executed successfully
[doctor] lineage 摘要
- 这是一轮 resumed run：当前运行继承自 fixture-legacy-fallback（source checkpoint: completed）。
- 源运行本身不是已记录的 resumed run，当前链路到此为止。
- 当前 resume 策略：post-rollback-inspection。
- 触发原因：source rollback already executed successfully。
- 当前已解析到 2 段 lineage 链。
- 操作建议：优先核对 rollback 结果与当前落地文件状态，确认是否适合继续后续动作。
- 当前策略优先产物：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-post-rollback-inspection/ROLLBACK-RESULT.json [rollback-result]
- 说明：当前 run 已产出 rollback 结果；在 post-rollback-inspection 下应先看这一份。
- 最近的异常祖先节点：fixture-legacy-fallback （repair=needs-attention）。
- 祖先参考产物：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-legacy-fallback/REPAIR-RESULT.json [repair-result]
- 说明：最近异常更偏向 repair 结论，建议先看这个结果文件。
[doctor] lineage chain
- depth: 2
- 1. [current] fixture-post-rollback-inspection (checkpoint=completed, final=success; strategy=post-rollback-inspection; reason=source rollback already executed successfully)
- 2. [ancestor-1] fixture-legacy-fallback (checkpoint=completed, final=success; strategy=fresh; reason=new-run; alerts=repair=needs-attention)
[doctor] 状态
- apply_execute: skipped
- repair:
- rollback: ok
- final: success
[doctor] apply result json
- path: __FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-post-rollback-inspection/APPLY-RESULT.json
- mode: dry-run
- final_status: ok
- nginx_test.requested: False
- nginx_test.status: not-run
- recovery.installer_status: success
- recovery.resume_strategy: dry-run-ok
- recovery.resume_recommended: True
- recovery.operator_action: review-plan
- next_step: 当前未进入真实执行。
[doctor] repair result json
- path: __FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-post-rollback-inspection/REPAIR-RESULT.json
- mode: dry-run
- final_status: blocked
- source_recovery.installer_status:
- source_recovery.resume_recommended: False
- source_recovery.operator_action:
- execution.nginx_test_rerun_status: not-run
- next_step: 来源 APPLY-RESULT.json 不是 execute 模式；repair helper 当前不把 dry-run 结果当作 post-apply repair 依据。
[doctor] rollback result json
- path: __FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-post-rollback-inspection/ROLLBACK-RESULT.json
- mode: execute
- final_status: ok
- flags.execute: True
- next_step: 已执行 selective rollback；建议先做现场复查，再决定是否重新 dry-run / apply。

- entries: 3
- last_event: run.complete [success]
- last_message: installer completed
[doctor] 下一步建议
- 已执行 selective rollback；建议先做现场复查，再决定是否重新 dry-run / apply。
